intro: Eurystemon mexicanus, also known as Mexican chamomile, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, characterized by its fragrant flowers and calming properties. The health benefits of Eurystemon mexicanus include its ability to reduce anxiety and promote relaxation, making it a popular herbal remedy for insomnia and stress relief. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, terpenoids, and sesquiterpenes, which are responsible for its sedative and anti-inflammatory effects. Eurystemon mexicanus is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive issues, menstrual cramps, and skin irritations.
